ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Arbitration Award Filed

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Further Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-19-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Rena Sera, Esq. (415.398.0200; rsera@vmbllp.com) of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP for Defendant/Moving Party.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Further Responses To Discovery is granted, unopposed.
Counsel for Defendant to prepare proposed order, directed to meet and confer with pro per plaintiff at time of service of order and submit proposed order to sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steve Stein, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING ON MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD RE: PLAINTIFF KAREN KRAMER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Joseph Bravo's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Counsel for the movant is required to prepare and submit a proposed judicial council order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)
